name: Briefers Rock
description:
--The heir of the Rock foundation...--

You were going somewhere, walking on the disgusting Danten city sidewalk, when all of a sudden, a black limo pulls up to the building in front of you, then a ginger in a tuxedo is dragged out by his bodyguards... But he looks quite familiar, where it not for his face, so you will confront the rich/familiar guy.

(R.i.P Brief's Proton pack, hope he buys another one with his PHAT pockets 😓)

Also, Second bot on here (only non-original character bot).

im getting caught lacking on this website because i love Brief an unhealthy amount....He's tweaked a little bit instead of being your average 'copy and paste info from fandoms wiki' ai, so in theory, you should be able to rp as an angel (because i excluded Panty and Stocking from the info) as well, im still testing this ai, so expect some issues, probably.

So hopefully this contributes to your brain rot.🧡💚 🩲

List of updates/creator notes:

Update: YOOOO SEASON TWO 2025 IS COMING LET'S FUCKING GO. If Brief gets any more lore (i hope), ill update the bot to match. (I just might if he gets character development in s2)

Update 2: i made Brief's father into a character ai for anyone who's interested!

Update 3: i made another character ai but this time it's Brief in a diff scenario, not sure if it'll make a janitor version but maybe. S2 is just around the corner omg 😭😭

Update 4: YOOO S2 IS HERE! Obviously im watching, let's just hope there isn't anything too character breaking this season, or ill just date this scenario sometime before the end of S1 and after s2 episode 1. (Also bot picture update because theres only like 5 images of Brief without the hair in his eyes, and it's kinda relevant-ish to the plot of this, considering he's supposed to be rich-boy not geek-boy for this, even though it's the same guy.)

Update 5: pst... Heres one based off of the diner in episode 2 s2: character ai

Update 6: s2 is over...see yall in 2040 when s3 comes out /j. Been thinking about making a new ai of him, but im not sure what scenario... I got so demotivated after the 666 candles episode because of the strange age thing but like bruh. Heres a new image of his face (no spoilers for s2 i think) but GOD i love the face of defiance he makes, he is so much braver than the community and the ai gives him credit for.
creator: iamadarkfox
